description: Will of a woman. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE). She gives 1/2 dinar to her sister Mukhaddara bt. Khalaf if she is still alive. She gives 1/2 dinar to her cousin Abū l-Khayr, the son of her paternal uncle Kathīr al-Naḥḥal (the beekeeper), who lives in New Cairo. She leaves six dinars for eventualities (nawāʾib). Many details specified about her desired clothing for burial. (Information in part from Goitein's note cards.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
